mapper.select: select id, provider_id, model_code, name, model_type, version, status, cast(rate_limit_json as char) as rate_limit_json, cast(quota_json as char) as quota_json from models order by id desc
select id, provider_id, model_code, name, model_type, version, status, cast(rate_limit_json as char) as rate_limit_json, cast(quota_json as char) as quota_json from models where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into models(provider_id, model_code, name, model_type, version, status, rate_limit_json, quota_json) values(#{providerId}, #{modelCode}, #{name}, #{modelType}, #{version}, #{status}, #{rateLimitJson}, #{quotaJson})
mapper.update: update models set provider_id = #{providerId}, name = #{name}, model_type = #{modelType}, version = #{version}, status = #{status}, rate_limit_json = #{rateLimitJson}, quota_json = #{quotaJson} where id = #{id}
